title: Warm Roasted Festive Saudi-Arabian Speck Bowl
description: A warm and inviting Saudi-Arabian dish featuring roasted speck, papillote, and aromatic spices served in a Korean brass bowl.
instructions: Season the speck with salt, black pepper, cumin, coriander, and paprika.
Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large pan over medium heat. Brown the speck on both sides. Remove from heat and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil to the pan. Add the sliced onion and cook until caramelized.
Add the mixed bell peppers and cook until tender.
Add the garlic, cumin, coriander, and paprika. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the browned speck back into the pan and stir to combine with the vegetables.
Transfer the speck mixture to a Korean brass bowl or individual papillotes.
Drizzle with lemon juice and serve warm.
